text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Four times a year, special competitions known as tryouts are held at
Tracen Academy. Here, trainers gauge the potential of talented
students.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All are welcome as spectators, whether they are an academy student
or a racing fan. This time, all of the trainers' eyes are on one runner in
particular.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To reach the upper echelons of the Twinkle Series and to achieve a
first-place victory in the Tenno Sho—these are my goals as a Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'll show you all exactly what I'm capable of during this tryout race!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro family is rich with a history of top-class runners, and I hear
that McQueen is their most promising up-and-comer. I'm lookin'
forward to this.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Even before entering the Academy, she's made a name for herself as
a talented stayer. I'm eager to see just how far she's honed her skills!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her flowing hair a striking ashen hue, Mejiro McQueen has captured
the attention of many.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, McQueen! Our group's up next. Let's get over to the gates!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes! Thank you, Ines Fujin.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Let's make haste!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen's tryout race is under way, and things aren't looking
good for her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The runners are fast approaching the finish line, but Mejiro McQueen
lingers at the rear!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Geh!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: She can't seem to catch up... Has she run out of steam?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she's not quite matching her reputation as a stayer, but maybe
we were expecting too much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wheeze, wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: She's giving it her all, but she can't catch up!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Ines Fujin leads the pack... and crosses the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin has won the tryout race! The shouts heard echoing across
the track are sure to follow her for years to come!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Hehe, thanks, everyone! Your cheers are what carried me to first place!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
A good pair of legs on her, that Ines Fujin. I bet that she could be an
absolute beast given the right training regimen.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Right. I'd love to have her on our team!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Today's supposed star, though... She didn't quite hit the strides I
thought she would.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Tch... How shameful!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro McQueen placing seventh, Ines Fujin completely steals
the spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deciding to visit the training course once more, I spot Mejiro
McQueen running down the track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No... I can do much better than that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey, thought I spotted you—McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, Ryan. Did you need something of me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: No, not really. I just saw you running from over there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen, you've got moxie, but don't you think you're overdoing it a
bit? That tryout race must have you beat...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the concern, but I'm going to keep going for a little
longer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen, you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My rivals in today's tryout race were of much higher caliber than I
anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I shouldn't have underestimated anyone. I knew that Tracen Academy is full of talented individuals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But I can still recover. I'll show everyone what I am capable of at the
next tryout race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't be able to call myself a Mejiro otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A flame flickers within her eyes as she proclaims her intentions to
succeed.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh? Well, if it isn't the new trainer everyone has been talking about!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Were any of the students on your mind after today's tryout races?
choice_data_list: Yeah, I'm interested in Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide then and there to pay Mejiro McQueen a visit on the
following day.
